word: G1853 - ἔξυπνος - éxypnos - ex'-oop-nos - Out of sleep

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἔζυπνος

- Transliteration: Exupnos

- Phonetic: ex'-oop-nos

- Definition:

1. roused out of a sleep

- Origin: from G1537 and G5258

- TDNT entry: 17:05,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5258; awake: - X out of sleep.
